title: الحزن والفقد
citation: Worden, J.W. (2009). Grief counseling and grief therapy: A handbook for the mental health practitioner (4th ed.). Springer.
content: [CONTENT AUTHOR REQUIRED] Gulf Arabic adaptation (~450 words). Cover: grief — inna lillahi frame without prescribing it; mourning period and community practices; continuing bonds as Islamic-compatible; tension between stoicism expectation and genuine grief need. REQUIRES CLINICAL REVIEWER before production ingestion. Khaleeji register.
